# Growth Mindset Parenting

> Practical, plainspoken parenting advice for parents of tweens and middle schoolers. By Sean Kane — 12-year middle school English teacher (Chicago public schools) and father of three sons.

Sean's approach applies classroom-tested teaching frameworks to home parenting. His content focuses on the developmental science of emerging adolescence — growth mindset, emotional regulation, and scaffolded independence. Influenced by Dr. David Yeager (growth mindset research), Daniel Siegel (adolescent neurobiology), and Lisa Damour (adolescent psychology).

## Core Content

- [The Six Practices](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/practices/): Six classroom-tested practices with scripts and cadences — Be the weather, Use the cooler, Inspect don't expect, Three to one, I do we do you do, Bad moment great opportunity
- [Letters Archive](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/letters/): Essay-format newsletter covering parenting, emotional regulation, middle school transition, co-parenting, and raising boys
- [About Sean Kane](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/about/): Sean's background, teaching methodology, influences, and contact

## Optional

- [RSS Feed](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/feed.xml): Full-text RSS feed of all published letters
